events.title: Color and Sip
events.summary: Escape the summer heat and join 55+ staff for a relaxing, creative break featuring refreshing lemonade and simple coloring fun. We’ll provide markers and a variety of coloring pages, so all you need to do is come to unwind and enjoy. No artistic skills required—just come to color, sip and relax!

events.title: Creative Commons
events.summary: Creative Commons provides a flexible and inspiring space for artists to explore their creative projects while fostering collaboration, conversation and the free exchange of ideas. Artists are encouraged to work at their own pace. Please bring your own materials, as there will be no supplies or formal instruction provided.
events.short_note: Workshop.

events.title: Mindful Meals
events.summary: This program with Virginia Cooperative Extension (VCE) focuses on enjoying food with intention. Participants will explore strategies for mindful eating, including slowing down, savoring flavors and making balanced food choices, all while fostering a positive relationship with meals.
events.short_note: Free craft activity.

events.title: Musician
events.summary: Each month, join 55+ staff to spotlight an artist, explore their story and cultural impact, and enjoy listening (and maybe singing along!) to some of their most memorable recordings. From jazz to soul to Latin pop, this series honors the talent and influence of iconic performers across generations. June: Duke Ellington. July: Patti LaBelle. August: Selena.
events.short_note: Music program.

events.title: Pre-k: Fireflies
events.summary: Ages 3 to 5 years. Preschool programs are offered throughout the year at both Gulf Branch and Long Branch Nature Centers. The theme for preschool programs is repeated during the month, so please register for only one session at each nature center per month. Caretakers must stay with their child during the program.
events.short_note: Free outdoor nature program.

events.title: Ptsd & Mental Health in Aging
events.summary: Join Sydney Palinkas, RAFT dementia education and outreach coordinator, for an informative discussion on how PTSD affects mental health as we age. Learn how trauma impacts memory, behavior and emotional well-being in older adults, along with supportive approaches that promote understanding, resilience and compassionate caregiving.

events.title: Travel Gurus: Ireland
events.summary: Are you interested in seeing and experiencing new places? Here is your opportunity to learn about destinations near and far from local “travel gurus” and start planning your next trip! Join 55+ volunteer Susan Court to explore the wonders of Ireland.
